steps.t: Aboki is located in Amdân. You should bring the scrap of fabric to Aboki.
Sacks of clothing can be found in Amdân. You should search the sacks of clothing for the ripped cloak.
Aboki is located in Amdân. You should ask Aboki about the torn cloak.
Dráttur can be found in Amdân. You should ask Dráttur about the torn cloak.
Thromur can be found in Amdân. Report back to Thromur.
